analysis_commentary: Third replicate: im_min=0.621, max=0.093, au=2. Three-run summary at entropy=0.008: 0/3 collapsed (seed-stable collapse prevention confirmed), but learning is seed-dependent — one fully learned (au=5), one partial (au=2), one stayed uniform (au=0). All three stayed below max=0.25. Current best (rep2) was a favorable seed; rep3 does not improve on it. Classification: regressed vs current best but confirms the 0.008 basin is real and the prior accept is legitimate.
